caption: A man wearing glasses and a patterned red and white traditional cap speaks into a microphone in a studio setting. He is dressed in a dark purple garment. To his left, a red vertical banner is visible, and a light blue background appears behind him. The "plustv" logo is displayed in the upper-left corner of the screen. A white banner across the bottom contains the text "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a smaller white bar reads "FOLLOW US" alongside social media icons and the text "PLUSTVAFRICA". At the very bottom of the screen, text indicates where to "WATCH ON" with logos for "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in the same position and expression, while the on-screen graphics and the man's appearance stay constant, showing minimal movement.
